creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wen         2009-12-23 13:43:00 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio                Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/p5-MusicBrainz-DiscID Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                pkg-plist 
  Log:
  MusicBrainz::DiscID is a class to calculate a MusicBrainz DiscID
  from an audio CD in the drive. The coding style is slightly different
  to the C interface to libdiscid, because it makes use of perl's
  Object Oriented functionality.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/MusicBrainz-DiscID
  
  PR:             ports/141906
  Submitted by:   Tobias Rehbein <tobias.rehbein@web.de>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1080    +1 -0      ports/audio/Makefile
  1.1       +26 -0     ports/audio/p5-MusicBrainz-DiscID/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/p5-MusicBrainz-DiscID/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/audio/p5-MusicBrainz-DiscID/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/audio/p5-MusicBrainz-DiscID/pkg-plist (new)
